ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "item_title" TEXT /* Title of the product */,
  "item_price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "item_sold" TEXT /* Number of units sold */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the product is listed */,
  "item_url" TEXT /* URL link to the product's page */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of the product based on sales */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "inventory_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average customer rating for the product */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of customer reviews for the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product was listed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "store_url" TEXT /* URL link to the store's page */,
  "store_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the store */,
  "store_location" TEXT /* Physical location or region of the store */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for customer service */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for customer service */,
  "store_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the store */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the store */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the store was registered */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the store details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being sold */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the sale was made */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of product sold */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated from the sale */,
  "sale_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the sale was made */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Any discount applied to the sale */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping for the sale */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the sale was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the sale record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., vendor, admin, customer) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was posted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
